title: Inventory water-quality monitoring data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating JMP, water-point, and environmental data.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.

title: Map water-quality monitoring coverage gaps
outcome: A sub-national map of water-quality monitoring coverage documenting where testing occurs and where it is absent.
validation_method: Replicator confirms monitoring-coverage methodology against independent sources.
done_condition: Monitoring-gap map with coverage documentation and replication.

title: Estimate fecal contamination risk in unmonitored areas
outcome: A contamination-risk map using environmental proxies for unmonitored areas.
validation_method: Replicator validates risk proxies against available water-quality test data and confirms accuracy.
done_condition: Risk map with proxy validation and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of water-quality data
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match water-quality monitoring planning needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases.
